description_long: This is a rugged, yellow SUV with a boxy, utilitarian design reminiscent of off-road vehicles like the Hummer H2. The exterior is covered in visible dirt and wear, suggesting frequent use in challenging environments. It features four large, knobby off-road tires with black rims, roof racks for additional cargo, and prominent fender flares. The windows are tinted black, and the front grille and bumper are reinforced with metallic elements. The vehicle has four passenger doors and a rear hatch, with visible door handles and side mirrors. The overall build is robust, with a high ground clearance and sturdy construction suitable for both urban and off-road scenarios.
description: A yellow, boxy SUV with off-road tires, roof racks, and a rugged, dirt-stained exterior.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back window, rear bumper, and roof racks; taillights and spare tire mount are visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting four doors, black off-road wheels, roof racks, and visible dirt on the body.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the grille, headlights, reinforced bumper, and high ground clearance.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with four doors, black wheels, and roof racks clearly visible.
attribute_wheel_design: black rims with deep-dish design and multiple thick spokes
